---
title: "Home"
---

# Md Mejanur Rahman Mejan

I am a student researcher interested in political behavior, electoral legitimacy, comparative politics, and public health risk perception. My work combines quantitative methods with applied social science research.

## Current roles
- Research Assistant, Department of Political Science, University of Idaho
- Research Trainee, Institute for Health in the Human Ecosystem (IHHE)
- Editorial Board Member, Cook Undergraduate Research Journal

## Contact
- Email: meja7831@vandals.uidaho.edu
- LinkedIn: [md-mejanur-rahman-mejan](https://www.linkedin.com/in/md-mejanur-rahman-mejan-389b5421b)
